headline: LyondellBasell: An Updated View On The Valuation Based On The Most Recent Result (Rating Downgrade)
summary: LyondellBasell has been a reliable dividend payer for 14 years managing to increase it in each of the past 12 years. See why LYB stock is downgraded to sell.
